hero.title: Building Stronger Communities Together
hero.subtitle: The Jadedval Foundation is dedicated to empowering lives through education, healthcare, and sustainable community development.

programs.heading: Our Key Programs
programs.subheading: We run impactful programs that create lasting change across multiple sectors.

education.title: Education
education.description: Providing scholarships, school supplies, and mentorship to underprivileged students.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Free medical outreach, health screenings, and wellness programs for communities.

skills.title: Skills Training
skills.description: Vocational training and entrepreneurship programs that empower economic independence.

community.title: Community Development
community.description: Infrastructure projects that improve living standards and community well-being.

youth.title: Youth Empowerment
youth.description: Leadership training, sports, and cultural programs for young people.

environment.title: Environment
environment.description: Tree planting, clean-up campaigns, and sustainability education initiatives.

cta.heading: Ready to Make a Difference?
cta.subheading: Join us in our mission to create a better world. Every contribution counts.

footer.tagline: Empowering communities through education, healthcare, and sustainable development.
